findings: PBKDF2-SHA256 200k iterations meets 2026 baseline for password-derived keys.
Fernet = AES-128-CBC + HMAC-SHA256 -- authenticated encryption; tampered ciphertext fails safely.
Constant-time compare via hmac.compare_digest -- no early-exit leak.
Alias index stored under a __index__ key inside the same namespace; not a secret itself, treated as public metadata.
Log redaction covers URL-safe blobs >=24 chars + explicit password= / token= key-values + JSON `password` field.
notes: Threat model exercised by 92 security tests + 25 module/API tests. No requirement to gate ship. QA proceeds. Rolling constraint: any new field emitted by credentials.py or auth.py must gain a claim_register.md entry.
review_criteria: QA runs the full suite one more time before shipping
Legal signs off on the disclaimer text
CPO signoff records the security stage as pass
